steps.title: Check current flatcar-container-linux deployment
steps.description:
Verify your flatcar-container-linux version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux
helm list -n flatcar-container-linux 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working flatcar-container-linux installation.

steps.title: Review flatcar-container-linux configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant flatcar-container-linux configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux
kubectl get configmap -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=flatcar-container-linux
```
Hello!

I'm improvising a format as per #736.

When running Flatcar as a guest/vm in Proxmox, there is no proper way to poweroff or restart Flatcar instances.

steps.title: Apply the fix for New Package Request: [qemu-guest-agent]
steps.description:
It should start automatically if you set `hw_qemu_guest_agent=yes` in your openstack instance config. You can testdrive one of the images from here: https://bincache.flatcar-linux.net/images/amd64/3396.0.0+qemu-guest-agent/.
```yaml
MariaDB > use nova
MariaDB [nova]> insert into instance_system_metadata (created_at, instance_uuid, `key`, value, deleted) VALUES (NOW(), '<InstanceID>', 'image_hw_qemu_guest_agent', 'yes', 0);
Query OK, 1 row affected (0.035 sec)
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux
kubectl get events -n flatcar-container-linux --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "New Package Request: [qemu-guest-agent]" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: It should start automatically if you set `hw_qemu_guest_agent=yes` in your openstack instance config. You can testdrive one of the images from here: https://bincache.flatcar-linux.net/images/amd64/3396.0.0+qemu-guest-agent/.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with flatcar-container-linux installed or the issue environment reproducible.
